tenants.title: Tenants
tenants.subtitle: Search and manage all companies on the platform.

detail.plan_comped_help: Stripe records an active paid plan but no charge is made.
detail.plan_unavailable: Plan updates are only available when Stripe billing is configured.
detail.security_disable_2fa_help: Use only to unblock access if the owner cannot receive 2FA codes.
detail.no_manage_permission: You do not have permission to manage tenant actions.
detail.no_feature_permission: You do not have permission to update feature flags.
detail.usage_warning: Some modules are close to or above their limits.
detail.no_limits_permission: You do not have permission to update limits.

support.title: Support tickets
support.subtitle: Track SLA, status, and tags for platform support requests.

announcements.subtitle: Manage videos or flyers shown on tenant/client dashboards.

form.title: Title
form.display_style_hint: Media only hides the title, message, and link.

announcements_preview.title: Announcement preview
announcements_preview.subtitle: Preview how announcements appear on the company dashboard.

top.title: Top placement
top.subtitle: Shown next to KPI cards at the top of the dashboard.
top.empty: No active announcements for the top placement.

quick.title: Quick actions placement
quick.subtitle: Replaces the quick actions card on the right side of the dashboard.
quick.empty: No active announcements for the quick actions placement.

notifications.title: Notification preferences
notifications.subtitle: Choose what alerts you receive and how you receive them.

plan_limits.title: Plan limits
plan_limits.subtitle: Set default usage caps per plan (leave blank for unlimited).
plan_limits.helper: Click a plan card to edit its limits (leave blank for unlimited).
plan_limits.modal_hint: Leave a field blank to keep it unlimited.

plan_modules.title: Plan modules
plan_modules.subtitle: Choose which modules are enabled per plan.
plan_modules.helper: Click a plan card to edit its enabled modules.
plan_modules.modal_hint: Disable modules to hide them from this plan.

plan_display.title: Plan display
plan_display.subtitle: Edit the content shown on plan cards (name, price label, badge, features).
plan_display.helper: Click a plan card to edit what is shown to companies.

welcome_builder.title: Welcome Builder
welcome_builder.subtitle: Edit the public welcome page like a mini CMS.

locale.label: Language
locale.hint: Changes apply to the selected locale only.

pages.title: Pages Builder
pages.subtitle: Create, edit, and publish public pages.
pages.empty: No pages yet. Create your first one.

locale.label: Language
locale.hint: Edits apply to the selected locale only.

header.title: Header
header.subtitle: Configure the hero background and public title alignment.

templates.title: Templates
templates.hint: Choose a template to pre-fill the page.

pricing.label: Pricing page
pricing.description: Plans and pricing for your offers.
pricing.page_subtitle: Pick the plan that fits your business.

hero.title: Simple, clear options
hero.body: Compare plans and choose the pace that fits.

plans.title: Everything to launch fast
plans.body: Each plan includes the essentials to start, then scale.

about.label: About page
about.page_subtitle: Our mission and how we help customers.

mission.title: Simplify field operations
mission.body: We help teams manage clients, quotes, and jobs without friction.

values.title: What guides us
values.body: Simple principles to deliver better, faster.

team.title: A team close to the field
team.body: We build with and for service pros.

sections.title: Sections
sections.empty_subtitle: You can start from scratch and add a new section or insert a block from the library.

shared_footer.title: Shared footer
shared_footer.subtitle: This footer is applied automatically across all public pages. Update it once here and the change will flow everywhere.
shared_footer.note: The footer is not managed like a regular body section. It stays global and shared across public pages.

contact_aside.title: Details column
contact_aside.subtitle: Add office, support, or contact-point details for the third column.

testimonial.title: Testimonial attribution
testimonial.subtitle: Add the name and role shown below the quote.

feature_pairs.secondary_subtitle: Configure the alternate secondary content and image.

showcase_cta.title: Layered media showcase
showcase_cta.subtitle: Configure the main visual, floating device mockup, media overlay, and trust badge.

industry_grid.cards_subtitle: Add the industries shown in the grid and an optional link for each card.

story_grid.title: Visual triptych
story_grid.subtitle: Add cards with a strong visual up top and supporting proof or explanation underneath.

testimonial_grid.title: Testimonial grid
testimonial_grid.subtitle: Add the quotes, names, and photos displayed in the card grid.

feature_tabs.title: Feature tabs
feature_tabs.subtitle: Add the accordion groups on the left and the detailed content shown on the right.
feature_tabs.children_subtitle: Each item can control its own text, image, and CTA in the right-side panel.

footer.title: Reusable footer content
footer.subtitle: Configure the logo, navigation columns, legal links, shared support card, contact details, social links, store badges, and footer copy.
footer.preview_subtitle: This summary follows the same order as the public footer: brand, contact, navigation, support, then bottom row.
footer.appearance_subtitle: Set the footer background and top brand row first.
footer.contact_subtitle: These items render in the left column of the public footer.
footer.brand_subtitle: Logo and primary link displayed at the start of the footer.
footer.navigation_subtitle: Manage each footer column here without relying on the mega menu.
footer.support_subtitle: This block maps to the right-side support panel in the public footer.
footer.bottom_subtitle: Configure the copyright text and legal links shown at the very bottom.
footer.legal_subtitle: These links are shown in the footer bottom row.

theme.title: Theme
theme.subtitle: Global style settings for this page.

visibility.title: Visibility
visibility.subtitle: Limit this section to a specific audience.

layout.subtitle: Configure the reusable block visuals before inserting it into a page.

hero.slides_subtitle: Define the photos that rotate inside the hero visual.

features.items_subtitle: Cards shown in the first feature grid.

workflow.steps_subtitle: Ordered cards shown beside the workflow visual.
